positive: A majestic golden retriever puppy playfully chasing a vibrant rainbow and a pile of brightly colored autumn leaves. The style is highly stylized modern cartoon vector art, with clean, thick outlines and solid color blocking. The composition should feature the dog centrally, mid-jump, against a simple, high-contrast background (like a soft pastel gradient sky). Use dynamic poses and exaggerated movement to create a sense of joy and whimsy. The overall color palette should be warm, inviting, and bright, emphasizing yellows, oranges, blues, and greens. Perfect for t-shirt printing, ensuring all elements have distinct, readable silhouettes and are flat-design optimized. Studio lighting, cinematic clarity, high contrast.
negative: blur, low quality, watermark, logo, text, signature, artifacts, dirty, fuzzy, realistic photograph, grayscale, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noisy, grainy
